name: plugin-manager-mcp
description: MCP server for deterministic harness plugin management.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm ci && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.publish:npm: npm ci && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm publish --access public
